content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'
csp: script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' blob: data:; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';
